description_long: This is a large, armored combat vehicle resembling a Soviet-era tank, featuring a prominent, angular turret mounted centrally on a rectangular chassis. The vehicle is equipped with a long, cylindrical main cannon extending from the turret, and the hull is covered with sloped armor plating for increased protection. The sides display a series of large, evenly spaced road wheels connected by continuous tracks, typical of tracked military vehicles. The upper surface of the hull and turret is flat with several raised hatches and circular details, likely for crew access and maintenance. The rear of the vehicle is boxy and slightly elevated, with no visible exhausts or external storage. The entire exterior is finished in a uniform olive green color, with no visible camouflage patterns, markings, or insignia.
description: A large, olive green armored tank with a central turret, long cannon, and continuous tracks on both sides. The vehicle features sloped armor and multiple hatches on its flat upper surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the main cannon, turret, and all road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, the width of the tracks, and the central position of the turret and cannon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the tracks, wheels, and turret from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the hull, the rear of the turret, and the cannon extending forward.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid olive green color.
